title: Golioth Stream Record
description: Schema for a single record returned by a LightDB Stream query. Each record is a flat object with a timestamp and any number of arbitrarily-named telemetry fields.

deviceId.description: Identifier of the device that produced the record. Present on project-scoped queries.

tags.description: Tag identifiers attached to the device at the time the record was produced.

additionalProperties.description: Telemetry fields. Names and types are defined by firmware emitting the data.
